---
name: Bug Report
about: A flaw or limitation with the spec or examples
title: "[BUG]"
labels: tsc-discuss
assignees: ''
type: Bug

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is and what happens.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Suggested fix**
Suggestions on how to fix the bug or actions to resolve. Feel free to link to a fix PR instead!

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
